mapper.select: select c.id, c.sei, c.mei, c.sei_kana, c.mei_kana, c.mail, c.tel, c.address1, c.address2, c.address3, c.address4 from customer c inner join login l on c.id = l.id where c.mail = #{mail} and l.password = #{password} and c.delete_flag = '0' and l.delete_flag = '0'
SELECT U.ID, U.SEI, U.MEI, U.SEI_KANA, U.MEI_KANA, U.MAIL FROM USER U WHERE U.ID = #{id} AND U.DELETE_FLAG = '0'
